example: She is a strong candidate for the position.
The stadium has a seating capacity of 50,000.
meaning: n.容量；能力；承受力；职位；身份

example: He carved his name into the tree.
The tower cast a long shadow in the evening.
meaning: v.投射（光、影）；抛；选派角色；n.演员阵容；石膏

example: The room has a high ceiling.
Everyone joined in the chorus of the song.
The electricity flows through the circuit.
Under no circumstances should you open the door.
meaning: n.情况；环境；条件（常用复数）

example: He cited several examples to support his argument.
The police found a clue at the scene.
Her competence in handling the task impressed everyone.
Attendance at the meeting is compulsory.
The decision was made after consultation with experts.
He prefers conventional methods of teaching.
The new policy is highly controversial.
Cost is an important criterion in choosing a product.
He remained upright despite the strong wind.
